# CWE-524: sensitive tokens stored in request-scoped context, not shared cache.
lang: go
file: CWE-524-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func CacheSessionToken(c *gin.Context) {
	c.Set("session_token", c.GetHeader("Authorization"))
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}

func FetchCachedToken(c *gin.Context) {
	if c.GetString("uid") != c.Query("uid") {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	tok, _ := c.Get("session_token")
	c.String(http.StatusOK, tok.(string))
}
